titleStmt.title: Memorandum From Ronald Lehman of the National Security Council Staff to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (McFarlane)

publicationStmt.p: Generated from TEI source for frus1981-88v11.xml by import-frus-volume.xq on February 27, 2024. Do not edit this file, as changes to this file will not be pulled back into the original file.

seriesStmt.title: Foreign Relations of the United States, 1981–1988, Volume XI, START I
Foreign Relations of the United States
Volume XI
START I

sourceDesc.bibl: Foreign Relations of the United States, 1981–1988, Volume XI, START I, Document 93
Memorandum From Ronald Lehman of the National Security Council Staff to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (McFarlane)

summary.bibl: Reagan Library, Intelligence Files, System II files—INT 8490035–88902478.
summary.seg: Sent for information. 2 pages not declassified.

listPerson.head: List of Persons (extract showing only persons mentioned in the present document, as described in the source volume's List of Persons)

person.occupation: Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Nuclear Forces and Arms Control Policy from 1981 until 1983; Special Assistant to the President and Senior Director of Defense Programs and Arms Control June 1983 until January 1986; Deputy Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs from January 1986 until March 1986; United States Negotiator on Strategic Nuclear Arms from March 1986 until February 1988; Assistant Secretary of Defense for International Security Policy from February 1988 to May 1989

Counselor of the Department of State from February 28, 1981 until April 4, 1982; Deputy Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs from January 1982 until November 1983; Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs from November 1983 until December 1985

body.head: 93. Memorandum From Ronald Lehman of the National Security Council Staff to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (McFarlane)Source: Reagan Library, Intelligence Files, System II files—INT 8490035–88902478. Secret; Sensitive. Eyes Only. Sent for information. 2 pages not declassified.
body.p: [Source: Reagan Library, Intelligence Files, System II files—INT 8490035–88902478. Secret; Sensitive. Eyes Only. Sent for information. 2 pages not declassified.]
